title: (Home Jam) City Pigeon Origin
description: A New York City Pigeon origin created for the Origins Home Jam!
body:
This is the City Pigeon origin by BlueBen8, made for the Origins Home Jam! This origin requires Fabric API, Origins, and Pehkui. This origin will likely not recieve any updates.

![City Pigeon Orb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63a6a7f0f0b51de5f8311af7cdc45d7186fd1bea.png)

City Pigeon powers:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

\+ Winged: You posses elytra wings and a slight resistance to fall based damage.

\+ Grand Escape: [Primary] You will be launched upwards. After 4 seconds, you will then be flung forwards. 40 second cooldown.

\+ The Divine Staple: Bread will refill your hunger and saturation bar fully upon consumption.

\+- Bird Bod: You are 1 block tall, but your width remains unchanged.

\- Vegetarian: You can't digest any meat.

\- Perception: You cannot equip anything in your helmet slot, as this will render you incapable of gauging depth around yourself.

\- I'm Walkin' Here: Your movement speed is slightly impeded.

</details>

Here's a video if you need more: [https://youtu.be/pJb71S8Ewac](https://youtu.be/pJb71S8Ewac)
